text_hindi: मैं आत्मा हूँ, शरीर नहीं।
text_english: I am the Atman, not this body. The body is my instrument — I am the one who wields it.

text_hindi: मेरी ऊर्जा पवित्र है। मैं इसे ईश्वर को अर्पित करता हूँ।
text_english: My vital energy is sacred. I offer it to the Divine. It rises as ojas, tejas, and virya.

text_hindi: जैसे अर्जुन ने अपने मन को जीता, मैं भी जीतूँगा।
text_english: As Arjuna conquered his mind with Krishna's guidance, so shall I conquer mine — through practice and dispassion.

text_hindi: हर दिन मैं अपने उच्चतम स्वरूप के करीब हूँ।
text_english: Every day I walk closer to my highest self. This is tapas — and tapas purifies.

text_hindi: ॐ भूर्भुवः स्वः। तत्सवितुर्वरेण्यं। भर्गो देवस्य धीमहि। धियो यो नः प्रचोदयात्।।
text_english: O Divine Light of the Sun — illuminate my intellect. I meditate on your supreme radiance. Guide my thoughts toward truth.

text_hindi: ॐ त्र्यम्बकं यजामहे सुगन्धिं पुष्टिवर्धनम्। उर्वारुकमिव बन्धनान्मृत्योर्मुक्षीय माऽमृतात्।।
text_english: I worship the three-eyed Lord who nourishes all beings. May He liberate me from the bondage of death as a cucumber is severed from its vine — never cutting me off from immortality.

text_hindi: मेरे पास कर्म करने का अधिकार है, फल की चिंता नहीं।
text_english: I have the right to act with full sincerity. The outcome belongs to God. I act and release.

text_hindi: मन चंचल है, पर मैं अभ्यास और वैराग्य से इसे वश में करूँगा।
text_english: The mind is restless, but through practice and dispassion, I bring it under my will, not it under mine.

text_hindi: इन्द्रियों के सुख क्षणिक हैं — वे दुःख के ही कारण हैं।
text_english: Pleasures born of sense contact are wombs of suffering. I choose the lasting bliss of the inner Self over the brief pleasure of the senses.
source_ref: Bhagavad Gita 5.22 — ye hi samsparshaja bhoga duhkhayonaya eva te

text_hindi: मैं उस योद्धा की तरह हूँ जो काम और क्रोध को जीतकर सच्ची शांति पाता है।
text_english: I am the warrior who conquers kama and krodha — desire and anger — the twin enemies of the soul. In this victory lies true peace.

text_hindi: अहं ब्रह्मास्मि। मैं ब्रह्म हूँ — शुद्ध, अनंत, अपरिवर्तनीय।
text_english: Aham Brahmasmi — I am Brahman. Pure, infinite, unchanging. This body is a vehicle; I am the eternal driver.

text_hindi: ब्रह्मचर्य मेरी शक्ति है। यह मुझे तेज, ओजस और वीर्य देता है।
text_english: Brahmacharya is my power. It builds in me ojas — the essential vital fluid — tejas, the inner brilliance, and virya, the life force.

text_hindi: मैं अपना सबसे अच्छा मित्र हूँ।
text_english: I am my own best friend. The self alone is the friend of the self — and the enemy. Today, I choose to be my own friend.

text_hindi: असतो मा सद्गमय। तमसो मा ज्योतिर्गमय। मृत्योर्मा अमृतं गमय।
text_english: Lead me from the unreal to the Real. From darkness to Light. From death to Immortality.

text_hindi: मेरे विचार शुद्ध हैं। मेरे कर्म शुद्ध हैं। मेरी ऊर्जा ऊपर उठ रही है।
text_english: My thoughts are pure. My actions are pure. My energy rises upward with every choice I make today.

text_hindi: जो होना है, वह होगा — मैं अपना धर्म निभाता हूँ।
text_english: What must happen will happen. I focus only on what is in my hands — my effort, my sincerity, my dharma.

text_hindi: कामक्रोधोद्भवं वेगं मैं सह सकता हूँ। यही सच्चा सुख है।
text_english: I can endure the impulse born of desire and anger before leaving this body. One who does this — he is the yogi, he is the happy one.

text_hindi: मेरी आत्मा न जन्मती है, न मरती है। मैं नित्य हूँ, शाश्वत हूँ।
text_english: My soul is never born, never dies. It is eternal, imperishable. The body changes — I do not.

text_hindi: ध्यान में मैं अपने सच्चे स्वरूप से मिलता हूँ।
text_english: In meditation, I meet my truest self. The noise of the world falls away. What remains is the witness — pure, still, luminous.

text_hindi: सत्यमेव जयते। सत्य ही जीतता है।
text_english: Truth alone triumphs. I walk the path of truth in my practice, my speech, my thoughts.

text_hindi: मेरा मन शांत है, जैसे तूफान में दीपक।
text_english: My mind is like a lamp in a windless place — steady, unflickering. No storm of sensation can extinguish this inner flame.

text_hindi: प्रत्येक उकसावे पर मैं श्वास लेता हूँ और ईश्वर को याद करता हूँ।
text_english: Each time an urge arises, I pause, breathe, and remember the Divine. This pause is my power. This is pratyahara.

text_hindi: तत् त्वम् असि। वह तुम हो।
text_english: Tat tvam asi — That thou art. The infinite consciousness that runs this universe — that is what I am. How can anything lesser define me?

text_hindi: अभ्यास और वैराग्य मेरे दो हथियार हैं।
text_english: Abhyasa and vairagya — consistent practice and dispassion — are my two weapons. With these, even the restless mind is conquered.

text_hindi: मैं राम का सेवक हूँ। राम के नाम में मेरी शक्ति है।
text_english: I am a servant of Ram. In His name lives my strength, my courage, my clarity. Ram naam is my shield.

text_hindi: मैं दिव्य गुणों को धारण करता हूँ — निर्भयता, सत्य, दया, संयम।
text_english: I embody the divine qualities — fearlessness, truth, compassion, self-restraint. These are my inheritance from the Gita 16.1-3.

text_hindi: मेरी इंद्रियाँ मेरे नियंत्रण में हैं, मैं उनके नियंत्रण में नहीं।
text_english: My senses serve me; I do not serve them. I am the master of the chariot. The horses do not drive me.

text_hindi: हर दिन का संघर्ष मुझे मजबूत बनाता है।
text_english: Every day of this struggle forges me stronger. The fire of tapas does not burn — it purifies. I welcome the heat.
source_ref: Bhagavad Gita 17.14-16 — three types of tapas

text_hindi: मैं ईश्वर के हाथों में हूँ। वे मेरे योग और क्षेम दोनों वहन करते हैं।
text_english: I am held in God's hands. He who worships with devotion — Krishna Himself carries their yoga (what they lack) and kshema (what they have). I am provided for.

text_hindi: सर्वधर्मान्परित्यज्य मामेकं शरणं व्रज। मैं शरण में हूँ।
text_english: Abandoning all forms of dharma, I take refuge in You alone, O Lord. Free me from all sins — this is Krishna's promise. I claim it today.
